---
name: Feature request
about: A new capability or maker domain
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What and why**
The capability, and the real use it serves.

**Is it buildable / demonstrated today?**
- [ ] Buildable today with cheap, orderable parts (BOM impact under the $1500 rig ceiling)
- [ ] Backed by a demonstrated paper (link it) — or is this a north-star item?

If north-star (not yet demonstrated), say so explicitly so it lands on the
`north-star` track, not the buildable one. See `docs/vision.md`.

**Sketch**
Rough approach, affected files, and how it would be tested (numerics anchored to the
literature where possible).
